titleStmt.title: SII 38.396: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 396. (A.R. No. 396 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the second gōpura of the same temple, right of entrance.

p.hi: King: Immaḍi Narasiṁha-mahārāya. Year: Śaka 1426, Raktākshi, Kumbha ba. di. 14. Sunday, Tiruvōṇam, Śivarātri = 2nd February 1505 A.D.

summary.p: Clumsily engraved as the stone was not dressed before the inscription was engraved.

It records that on the auspicious occasion of Śivarāttiri, Samarapuṅga-Dīkshitaṉ, son of Kiḍāmbi Ananda Bhaṭṭaṉ of Atrēya-gōtra and Āpastaṁba-sūtrā donated, Maṇalpākkam alias Sōmāsipuram, a village situated on the south bank of (the river) Śeyyāṟu in Tachchūr-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam in Murgamaṅgalappaṟṟu, to the goddess Periyanāchchiyār of Dēvikipuram for (supplying) oblations. It is also stated that this village was given to the donor by Tirumalai-Nāyakkar in the earlier days for his performance of agnihōtrā (keeping the sacred fire).
The inscription concludes with the usual imprecatory versed found in the Vijayanagar records.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvara medanimisara gaṇḍakaṭhāri sāḷuva (sāḷuva) narasiṁharāyar ( rāyar) kumārar Immaṭi narasiṁharāya mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 2 10 6l mel cellāniṉṟa rattākṣisamvatsarattu kumbhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa
ttu catuduśiyum tiruvoṇamum Ādityavāramum peṟṟa śivarātri pūṇya kālattile Atreyagotrattu Āpastamba sutrattu kiṭāmpi Anan=tabhaṭṭaṉ putraṉ samarapuṅgavadīkṣitaṉ devakipuram śrīmuniśvaran periyanācciyāṟku dharmmas[āsa]nam paṇṇiRead paṇṇi kkuṭuttapaṭi Enakku
muṉṉāḷ tirumalai nāyakkar nāyakkar Eṉṉiṭa Agnihotrattukku yārāRead dhārāpūrvakam Āka tanta grāmam murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu palkuṉṟak koṭṭattut taccūrnāṭṭu ceyyāṟṟukkut teṉkaraiy maṇal pākkamā
ṉa comacipuram grāmam Oṉṟe ma kālam l Oṭu rājannaivadyattukku civarāttiri puṇyakālattile sahiraṇyodaka dhārā pūrvamāka paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Inta grāmam nañcai puñcai nāṟ
pāṟkellaiyuḷpaṭṭa nidhinikṣepa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇya Agāmi siddasātdhyam Eṉkiṟa Aṣṭabhogatejasvāmyaṅkaḷumuḷḷāka catussīmakragāmatamāka yinta grāmamoṉṟum kuḻittuThe words kuḻittu [nilam] is found engraved in small letter below the line.nilam Aṉubhavittuk koḷḷakkaṭavar Ākavum
svadattām paradattaām vāyohareta vasuṇḍarām ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhiyā [jāya*] krimiḥ dānapāla nayot mu dānāśreyonu pālanam dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pā
lanādacyutam padam . svadattādviguṇam puṇyam paradattā 3 pālanam . paradattā pahāreṇa svadattam nniṣpalam bhuvet . Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṇkaik
karaiyile kārāmLines 8-12 were written in different style.
pacuvai koṉṟa paāvatti[ lai]
pokakaṭavarākavum cupa
mattu .
Digital edition of SII 38.396 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
